text: I find myself in an environment saturated with artificial light and shadow, glass reflecting the sterile geometry of the ceiling. The absence of people and the silence weigh heavily, evoking a sense of isolation and anticipation. Moving to a dim corner, I see the promise of innovation ('R+D' looms large on the wall), yet it feels dormant in this darkness. My presence here feels inquisitive but slightly uneasy, as if I am witnessing the latent energy of a place awaiting purpose or awakening.
